text: Abhishek Kalyan is an SPS Associate Advisor at Amazon Development Center in Hyderabad with over 9 years of experience in customer support and operations leadership.
He has supported 186 associates and mentored between 30 and 50 associates each year while helping maintain operational excellence.
He has interviewed and onboarded 18 associates and helped standardize 43 operational SOPs to improve execution consistency.
Project Velocity reduced backlog by 35 percent and delivered approximately 280 thousand dollars in savings.
Project Sigma reduced policy deviation rates by 18 percent and produced approximately 320 thousand dollars in operational savings.
Project Nexus reduced onboarding ramp time by 30 percent by improving training programs.
Abhishek helped launch the Global Centralized Advisor Pool where advisors are pooled globally instead of assigned to individual teams, improving support efficiency across associates.
He maintains 99 to 100 percent quality scores through strict SOP adherence and has handled over 12000 escalation contacts across calls emails and chats.
